'''βàös-zh-k-p''' ('''kasazhkepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:teleconference|teleconference]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-zh-k-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:teleconference|teleconference]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàös-zh-k-p
|-
! Lemma
| kasazhkepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisazhkepoko|thisazhkepoko]] || [[word:jisazhkepoko|jisazhkepoko]] || [[word:shisazhkepoko|shisazhkepoko]] || [[word:kisazhkepoko|kisazhkepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusazhkepoko|thuthusazhkepoko]] || [[word:jujusazhkepoko|jujusazhkepoko]] || [[word:shushusazhkepoko|shushusazhkepoko]] || [[word:kukusazhkepoko|kukusazhkepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusazhkepoko|thusazhkepoko]] || [[word:jusazhkepoko|jusazhkepoko]] || [[word:shusazhkepoko|shusazhkepoko]] || [[word:kusazhkepoko|kusazhkepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusazhkepoko|thusazhkepoko]] || [[word:jusazhkepoko|jusazhkepoko]] || [[word:shusazhkepoko|shusazhkepoko]] || [[word:kusazhkepoko|kusazhkepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesazhkepoko|thesazhkepoko]] || [[word:jesazhkepoko|jesazhkepoko]] || [[word:shesazhkepoko|shesazhkepoko]] || [[word:kesazhkepoko|kesazhkepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosazhkepoko|thothosazhkepoko]] || [[word:jojosazhkepoko|jojosazhkepoko]] || [[word:shoshosazhkepoko|shoshosazhkepoko]] || [[word:kokosazhkepoko|kokosazhkepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosazhkepoko|thosazhkepoko]] || [[word:josazhkepoko|josazhkepoko]] || [[word:shosazhkepoko|shosazhkepoko]] || [[word:kosazhkepoko|kosazhkepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosazhkepoko|thosazhkepoko]] || [[word:josazhkepoko|josazhkepoko]] || [[word:shosazhkepoko|shosazhkepoko]] || [[word:kosazhkepoko|kosazhkepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thΟΠsazhkepoko|thΟΠsazhkepoko]] || [[word:jΟΠsazhkepoko|jΟΠsazhkepoko]] || [[word:shΟΠsazhkepoko|shΟΠsazhkepoko]] || [[word:kΟΠsazhkepoko|kΟΠsazhkepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasazhkepoko|thathasazhkepoko]] || [[word:jajasazhkepoko|jajasazhkepoko]] || [[word:shashasazhkepoko|shashasazhkepoko]] || [[word:kakasazhkepoko|kakasazhkepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasazhkepoko|thasazhkepoko]] || [[word:jasazhkepoko|jasazhkepoko]] || [[word:shasazhkepoko|shasazhkepoko]] || [[word:kasazhkepoko|kasazhkepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasazhkepoko|thasazhkepoko]] || [[word:jasazhkepoko|jasazhkepoko]] || [[word:shasazhkepoko|shasazhkepoko]] || [[word:kasazhkepoko|kasazhkepoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shasazhkepithi|shasazhkepithi]] || [[word:shasazhkepiji|shasazhkepiji]] || [[word:shasazhkepishi|shasazhkepishi]] || [[word:shasazhkepiki|shasazhkepiki]]
